headline: Cloudflare (NET) and GoDaddy Partner on AI Crawl Control and Bot Identity Standards – What’s Changed
summary: Cloudflare, Inc. and GoDaddy recently announced a partnership to give website owners and AI developers more transparency and control over how AI agents access and use their online content, including through GoDaddy’s integration of Cloudflare’s AI Crawl Control into its hosting platform. By pairing AI Crawl Control with cryptographically verifiable bot identity standards like ANS and Web Bot Auth, the companies are positioning themselves at the center of a permission-based, AI-driven web...

headline: Cloudflare GoDaddy AI Partnership Puts Valuation And Growth Story In Focus
summary: Cloudflare and GoDaddy announced a new partnership to give website and AI developers tools for transparency, control, and compensation in AI driven content usage. The collaboration centers on integrating Cloudflare’s AI Crawl Control into GoDaddy’s platform and establishing verifiable AI agent identity and value exchange. The move targets the emerging agentic web, where AI agents interact directly with online content and services. For investors watching Cloudflare (NYSE:NET), this...

headline: GoDaddy Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, April 30, 2026
summary: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY) will release financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, after the U.S. stock market closes.

headline: Cloudflare and GoDaddy Partner to Help Enable an Open Agentic Web
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & TEMPE, Ariz., April 07, 2026--Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), the leading connectivity cloud company, and GoDaddy (NYSE: GDDY), global leader in domains and tech for small businesses, today announced a strategic partnership to help give website owners and AI developers transparency and control over how their content is used by AI, while also supporting standards to better identify AI agents. headline: Is LegalZoom (LZ) Quietly Rewriting Its Risk Profile With AI Agents And Buybacks?
summary: In recent months, LegalZoom.com has accelerated its push into artificial intelligence, launched an AI legal agent registered through GoDaddy’s Agent Name Service, and authorized a US$100,000,000 share repurchase program while emphasizing subscription-based compliance and concierge offerings. An interesting angle is LegalZoom’s attempt to blend human attorneys with AI-driven workflows to build trustable, scalable legal infrastructure for small businesses, even as analysts voice concerns about...

headline: A Look At GoDaddy (GDDY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: GoDaddy (GDDY) has been drawing investor attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock showing a 12% decline over the past month and about 31% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for GoDaddy. Looking beyond the recent weakness, GoDaddy’s 1-year total shareholder return of a 49% decline contrasts with a 3-year total shareholder return of an 8% gain, suggesting shorter term momentum has faded even as longer term holders remain modestly in positive...
